title: Bridge Essay: Interoception visualization relieves acute pain.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Birth/Body** (Phase 1) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Birth/Body to mechanistic neuroscience through Interoception, visualization, relieves, acute, pain..

**Interoception visualization relieves acute pain.** — Biol Psychol. PMID: 35077847. DOI: 10.1016/j.biopsycho.2022.108276. Interoception is the sensation of the physiological state inside one'sbody. Growing evidence suggests that visual feedback of interoception improves body self-consciousness (BSC) and reduces pain perception among patients with chronic pain. However, whether the integration of exteroception and interoception influences pain processing in healthy individuals remains largely unknown. To examine this question, we combined the rubber hand illusion (RHI) paradigm with visualized interoception -flashi
